title: Frente de Todos / Kirchnerismo Financial Map
summary: Comprehensive mapping of Kirchnerist political figures, their wealth declarations, judicial status, offshore connections, state contracts received, and family business networks. Balances the investigation which previously skewed toward Macri/Milei coverage.

patrimonio_declared.composition: Usufruct of 2 properties (Recoleta apt ARS 35.7M, El Calafate residence ARS 24.8M), car purchased Jul 2023, Mercado Libre shares (1,667 shares, ARS 39.7M), Apple shares
patrimonio_declared.note: Transferred properties to children Maximo and Florencia in March 2016. No properties in her own name.

causa_vialidad.sentence: 6 years prison + perpetual disqualification from public office
causa_vialidad.crime: Fraudulent administration - irregular assignment of 51 road works in Santa Cruz to Lazaro Baez
causa_vialidad.current_situation: House arrest at San Jose 1111, CABA

causa_hotesur_los_sauces.crime: Money laundering, criminal association - fictitious hotel/property rentals through family companies Hotesur and Los Sauces
causa_hotesur_los_sauces.supreme_court_decision: December 2024 - revoked dismissal, ordered oral trial

cristina_fernandez_de_kirchner.offshore: Not directly linked to Panama Papers. Daniel Munoz (Nestor Kirchner's secretary) linked to BVI offshore. Federico Elaskar alleged 40-45 offshore companies in Belize, Panama, Seychelles but direct K connection disputed.

patrimonio_declared.composition: Toyota Corolla XEI 2019 (ARS 4.5M), household items (ARS 530K), 50% of Inmueble Callao 1960 SA (ARS 84K)

causa_seguros.crime: Incompatible negotiations - Decree 823/2021 created insurance monopoly benefiting broker Martinez Sosa
causa_seguros.detail: Martinez Sosa (husband of AF's secretary Maria Cantero) received 59.6% of all commissions from Nacion Seguros. Confirmed by Federal Chamber Nov 2025. Cassation review Feb 2026.

causa_violencia_genero.charges: Aggravated minor injuries (2 occasions), aggravated serious injuries, coercive threats - all in context of gender violence against partner Fabiola Yanez
causa_violencia_genero.detail: Judge Rafecas rejected challenge March 2026, case near oral trial

sergio_massa.role: Former Economy Minister (2022-2023), FdT presidential candidate

patrimonio_declared.composition: 2 properties in Tigre (480m2 house ARS 8.9M, 525m2 house ARS 5.5M), VW Tiguan 2011 (ARS 2M), savings ARS 461K, USD 0.33
patrimonio_declared.note: Properties at fiscal value, not market value. Galmarini declared more than Massa.

malena_galmarini.controversy: Denounced for irregular $127M USD contract with Mauricio Filiberti (Transclor, 'Rey del Cloro') for chlorine supply. Price $504/ton vs possible $390-430/ton. Complaint judicially dismissed.
malena_galmarini.conflict_of_interest: Massa authorized AySA deficit by decree - company his wife chaired

sergio_massa.offshore: NOT in Panama Papers (verified by Chequeado). A 'Sergio Massa' in Florida registries is a Peruvian businessman, not the Argentine minister.
sergio_massa.economic_record: Assumed with 102% exchange gap, reduced initially but blue dollar spiraled by end of tenure

causa_ruta_dinero_k.conviction: 10 years prison (confirmed by Supreme Court May 2025)

causa_vialidad.crime: Fraudulent administration in 51 public works in Santa Cruz
causa_vialidad.detail: 80% of road works monopolized. Of 51 works, 26 completed, none on time. Overpricing up to 387%. Total value (updated to 2016): ~ARS 46B

el_entrevero.crime: Money laundering in Uruguay farm purchase

lazaro_baez.lost_assets: Austral Construcciones facilities seized by Santa Cruz government

causa_once.crime: Fraudulent administration - tolerated misuse of funds by TBA concessionaire
causa_once.context: Once train tragedy: 52 dead, 789 injured, February 2012

causa_gnl.crime: Fraud in LNG purchases - USD 5.5M paid unnecessarily to intermediaries with overpricing

causa_skanska.crime: Fraudulent administration and bribery in gas pipeline contracts. Overpricing: 11.72% on loops, 125% on compressor plants, USD 34M on TGS works

causa_enriquecimiento.detail: 18 years unable to justify asset growth

causa_tv_digital.crime: Overpricing 56.2% in Digital TV infrastructure (ARS 118.9M excess)

components: 2019: 6 years for illicit enrichment (convent bags - USD 9M)
2022: Vialidad case conviction for fraudulent administration
judicial_status.seized_assets: USD 8,982,047 + EUR 153,610 + ARS 159,114 - donated to Hospital Garrahan and Hospital Gutierrez

jose_lopez.key_event: June 14, 2016: caught at Monastery of Our Lady of Fatima in General Rodriguez hiding bags with nearly USD 9M, jewels and a firearm

causa_ciccone.crime: Passive bribery and incompatible negotiations - covertly acquired Ciccone Calcografica printing press (only private currency printer) through front man Alejandro Vandenbroele (The Old Fund)
causa_ciccone.distinction: First VP in Argentine history with final corruption conviction

causa_enriquecimiento.crime: Illicit enrichment and bribery - could not justify asset growth
causa_enriquecimiento.front_people: Daughter Julieta Jaime, ex-partner Silvia Reyss, Manuel Vazquez

judicial_status.current_status: Imprisoned at Ezeiza federal prison since November 2024

causa_gnl.crime: Fraud in LNG purchases with overpricing

causa_cuadernos.crime: Identified as main bribe collector for Kirchnerism. Accused of collecting USD 1.5M+ in bribes from major businessmen
causa_cuadernos.detail: Secretary Nelson Lazarte accused of 68 bribe deliveries
causa_cuadernos.scope: 63 businessmen on trial, multiple arrepentidos (cooperating witnesses)

patrimonio_declared.growth: 203% in one year (tripled during economic crisis)
patrimonio_declared.composition: 4 properties (25% plot Pilar, house CABA, 2 apartments CABA), VW vehicle, USD savings
patrimonio_declared.income_explanation: Governor salary ARS 2.7M + ARS 5.7M from sale of vacation home

axel_kicillof.political_note: Dispute with national government over ARS 12.9T in debt owed to province. 1,000+ national public works paralyzed in Buenos Aires municipalities.

composition.properties: 4 properties (2 in Mercedes, 2 in CABA) - ARS 26M
composition.dos_luceros_sa: 95% stake - ARS 637M - soy, corn, cattle. 890,000 m2 inherited field in Mercedes
composition.ustare_sa: 25% stake - ARS 43M - rural real estate services. Shared with cousins Ustarroz

eduardo_wado_de_pedro.state_roles: VP of Aerolineas Argentinas, Telecom board member (state representative)

anibal_fernandez.role: Former Security Minister (2021-2023), former Cabinet Chief

efedrina.allegations: Linked to ephedrine trafficking by convicted Martin Lanatta. Ephedrine imports grew from 4,000 to 15,000 kg (2005-2006) during his tenure.
efedrina.enrichment: Federal prosecutor opened investigation for illicit enrichment based on legislator Gustavo Vera's complaint

hebe_de_bonafini.role: President, Madres de Plaza de Mayo

suenos_compartidos.crime: Fraud against State - Suenos Compartidos social housing program
suenos_compartidos.amount_diverted: ARS 206M by Schoklender brothers (properties, cars, motorcycles, yachts)
suenos_compartidos.political_financing: Sergio Schoklender alleged funds used to finance campaigns of Cristina Kirchner and Amado Boudou

carlos_zannini.role: Former Legal and Technical Secretary (2003-2015), Treasury Prosecutor (2019-2023)

judicial_status.enrichment: Investigation opened, then closed/dismissed. Judge Canicoba Corral dismissed, noting case did not affect 'good name and honor'
judicial_status.allegations: Alleged front man in Cordoba conducting millionaire business (from tire shop to vehicles, real estate, companies)

total_convicted_kirchnerism.note: Additional: Ricardo Echegaray (4 yrs 8 mo) already in dataset

summary_stats.key_pattern: State contracts -> overpricing -> intermediary extraction -> offshore laundering -> domestic reinvestment through front people
